raw_title: Future Imaginaries of Visual Open Source Investigative Journalism
title_en: Future Imaginaries of Visual Open Source Investigative Journalism
title_zh: 视觉开源调查新闻的未来想象
plain_summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨了视觉开源调查新闻的未来可能性。它研究记者如何利用公开可得的视觉材料（如卫星图像、社交媒体视频）进行调查报道，并想象这种新闻形式在未来会如何发展。
plain_summary_en: This article explores the future possibilities of visual open source investigative journalism. It examines how journalists use publicly available visual materials (such as satellite images, social media videos) for investigative reporting and imagines how this form of journalism might develop in the future.
research_direction_zh: 数字新闻学中的创新报道方法研究，特别是开源调查技术和视觉叙事在新闻实践中的融合与应用前景。
research_direction_en: Research on innovative reporting methods in digital journalism, particularly the integration and application prospects of open source investigation techniques and visual storytelling in journalistic practice.
